backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single high-confidence feature (REQ-19) requiring the Elite Properties logo with gold-to-silver gradient ring styling to be added to Navbar.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key styling/content details of each component and config file.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Elite Properties Real Estate Consultant' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full single-page layout by rendering Navbar, Hero, FeaturedCommercialCard, About, Services, Contact, and Footer in order.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About/Why Choose Us section rendered on a dark charcoal background, featuring a stats bar and six highlight cards with champagne gold icon badges and gradient text accents.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with address, hours, and phone info cards plus a WhatsApp enquiry panel, styled with champagne gold gradients and gold outline borders on a dark background.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Multi-column footer with the Elite Properties logo in a gradient border ring, contact info, quick links, WhatsApp CTA, copyright notice, and champagne gold accent styling.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, large 'Elite Properties' heading in Playfair Display, champagne gold gradient subtitle, Hindi name, tagline, and WhatsApp/Call CTA buttons.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar for Elite Properties with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll anchor links, mobile hamburger menu, and a phone CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Defines a 19-item real estate services grid and a standalone FeaturedCommercialCard section with gold gradient styling, rendered between the hero and services grid.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no backend queries, as the site is a static informational website.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for the champagne gold and charcoal brand color system in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with oklch-based gold, charcoal, and platinum color palettes, custom font families, border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 13) for a yellow-themed single-page real estate website for Elite Properties, Pune, including architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features with their requirements.
